=== CRYPTO PORTFOLIO RUN — 2026-06-30 ===  (data: TradingView MCP)

UNI is downgraded from BUY to HOLD after its RSI dropped to 45 (below the 50 threshold that triggers the momentum gate), turning Druckenmiller bearish and splitting the quorum 3/2. SOL is the session's standout: RSI surged to 53 with a positive MACD, putting price within 2% of its EMA20 ($75.47) — a daily close above that level would fully satisfy the momentum gate and upgrade the signal. AAVE remains the only full BUY, now slightly better-priced at $89 vs $92 yesterday as RSI cooled from 67 to 63; JUP holds its small BUY. F&G rose from 12 to 15 — still Extreme Fear, cap unchanged at 4 BUYs.

=== BLOCK 2 — Per-Token Verdicts ===

### BTC — HOLD
BTC slipped to $59,430 today, now clearly below the 200-week moving average cost-basis floor at $62,640 — a level that held yesterday but broke overnight. RSI is 32, MACD momentum is fading fast (+5.89 vs +16.68 yesterday), and the death cross remains active. Fair value, not cheap, with no momentum or liquidity trigger. A cautious hold.

Research Desk:
  Technical:   $59,430. Below all MAs (EMA20 ~$62,860, SMA200 ~$75,558, 200wMA $62,640). Death cross active. RSI 32.17 (further into oversold). MACD hist +5.89 — still faintly positive but decelerating sharply from +16.68 yesterday. -38.3% from 52w high.
  On-Chain:    Now 94.9% of the 200-week MA ($62,640) — breached below this historical cost-basis floor today [source: TradingView data]. Historically, closes below the 200wMA have marked deep capitulation zones.
  DeFi:        n/a — L1 (no protocol revenue accrual)
  Macro:       Risk-off continues: "outflows from U.S. spot bitcoin ETFs, a hawkish Federal Reserve and a strong dollar" [source: https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2026/06/28/bitcoin-falls-below-usd60-000-on-track-for-a-rare-back-to-back-quarterly-loss]. India USDT premium hit 8.5% after payment crackdown raids in Bengaluru [source: https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2026/06/29/usdt-jumps-to-8-5-premium-in-india-after-crypto-payment-crackdown]. US crypto market structure bill "far from assured" before midterm election per TD Cowen [source: https://www.theblock.co/post/406621/td-cowen-crypto-market-structure-bill-clarity-act].
  Smart Money: Strategy paused new BTC buys, set a $1B digital-credit repurchase program (USD reserve >$2.5B); Saylor buyback plans ongoing [source: https://www.theblock.co/post/406568/strategy-mstr-strc-shares-recover-after-brutal-week-saylor-unveils-new-buyback-plans]. Ark Invest loading up on Coinbase, Circle, Robinhood — crypto-adjacent rather than direct BTC [source: https://www.theblock.co/post/406628/ark-invest-coinbase-circle-bullish-robinhood-monday].

Panel:
  Graham (Value):          NEUTRAL — now below the 200wMA cost floor; still not cheap enough (< 80% of 200wMA) to clear a margin-of-safety threshold, and BTC has no cash-flow anchor.
  Buffett (Quality):       NEUTRAL — dominant monetary network moat but no revenue to underwrite a buy.
  Dalio (Cycle):           BEARISH — hawkish Fed + rising DXY + ETF outflows = textbook risk-off/tightening trigger.
  Druckenmiller (Trend):   BEARISH — death cross active, RSI 32.17 < 40, MACD hist collapsing (+5.89 vs +16.68); downtrend intact.
  Burniske (On-chain):     NEUTRAL — no protocol fee capture accrues to holders; valued purely on monetary premium.

Bull: Below the 200-week cost-basis floor in Extreme Fear — historically a high-reward zone for patient capital willing to hold through a trough.
Bear: Death cross + decelerating MACD + ETF outflows + hawkish Fed: no momentum or liquidity catalyst to form a bottom yet.

### ETH — HOLD
ETH dipped to $1,590, RSI 31, MACD still negative (-20.81). Deeply discounted — 64% of its 200-week moving average — with real fee/burn value and Bitmine now holding 4.7% of supply. But no momentum reversal yet. Three bulls, two bears → split → hold.

UK FCA published landmark crypto framework (Oct 2027 authorization regime) — positive for long-run institutional clarity [source: https://www.theblock.co/post/406546/uk-sets-capital-market-abuse-rules-landmark-crypto-framework].
  Smart Money: Bitmine ETH treasury at 5.70M ETH (4.7% of supply, $8.9B) — structural float tightener [source: https://www.theblock.co/post/406538/bitmine-lifts-ethereum-treasury-to-5-7-million-eth-through-challenging-weekly-slide-joins-russell-1000]. Securitize debuting on NYSE Thursday — RWA tokenization signal for ETH ecosystem [source: https://www.theblock.co/post/406634/securitize-nyse-debut-thursday].

Bear: Momentum still negative and worsening (MACD -20.81); macro risk-off; no confirmed bottom.

📊 Daily Crypto Brief — 2026-06-30

😨 Fear & Greed: 15 (Extreme Fear) — regime cap 4 BUYs | F&G edged up from 12 to 15, still deep fear
🌍 Macro: Risk-off holds. BTC slipped below its 200-week moving average ($62,640) overnight — a key support breach. UK FCA published a landmark crypto regulatory framework (effective Oct 2027), positive for long-run institutional adoption. US market structure bill passage remains uncertain (TD Cowen). India USDT premium hit 8.5% after payment firm raids.
